---
title: "Gallery"
subtitle: "光影之间 · Moments in Light"
filters:
   - lightbox
lightbox:
  match: auto
  effect: fade
  loop: true
toc: false
page-layout: full
---

<style>
/* ========== 全局背景 ========== */
.quarto-container {
  background: linear-gradient(180deg, 
    var(--bs-body-bg) 0%, 
    color-mix(in srgb, var(--bs-body-bg) 95%, var(--bs-primary)) 100%
  );
}

/* ========== 优雅分隔线 ========== */
.elegant-divider {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
  margin: 3rem 0 2.5rem;
  gap: 1.5rem;
}

.elegant-divider::before,
.elegant-divider::after {
  content: '';
  flex: 1;
  max-width: 200px;
  height: 1px;
  background: linear-gradient(90deg, 
    transparent, 
    var(--bs-secondary), 
    transparent
  );
}

.divider-symbol {
  font-size: 1.2rem;
  color: var(--bs-secondary);
  letter-spacing: 8px;
}

/* ========== 章节标题 ========== */
.section-title {
  font-family: "Cormorant Garamond", Georgia, serif;
  font-size: 2rem;
  font-weight: 500;
  text-align: center;
  margin: 2rem 0 1.5rem;
  color: var(--bs-heading-color);
  position: relative;
}

.section-title::after {
  content: '';
  display: block;
  width: 60px;
  height: 2px;
  background: linear-gradient(90deg, 
    transparent, 
    var(--bs-primary), 
    transparent
  );
  margin: 0.8rem auto 0;
}

/* ========== 介绍文字 ========== */
.intro-text {
  text-align: center;
  font-family: "Cormorant Garamond", Georgia, serif;
  font-size: 1.2rem;
  font-style: italic;
  color: var(--bs-secondary-color);
  max-width: 650px;
  margin: 0 auto 2.5rem;
  line-height: 1.9;
  letter-spacing: 0.02em;
}

/* ========== 画廊容器 ========== */
.gallery-wrapper {
  background: var(--bs-tertiary-bg);
  border-radius: 20px;
  padding: 2rem;
  margin: 1.5rem 0;
  box-shadow: 
    0 4px 30px rgba(0,0,0,0.08),
    inset 0 1px 0 rgba(255,255,255,0.1);
  backdrop-filter: blur(10px);
}

/* ========== 图片样式 ========== */
.quarto-figure {
  margin: 0.75rem;
  overflow: hidden;
  border-radius: 16px;
  position: relative;
}

.quarto-figure img {
  border-radius: 16px;
  transition: all 0.5s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1);
  filter: brightness(0.95) saturate(1.05);
}

.quarto-figure img:hover {
  transform: scale(1.03);
  filter: brightness(1) saturate(1.1);
  box-shadow: 
    0 25px 50px rgba(0,0,0,0.2),
    0 0 0 1px rgba(255,255,255,0.1);
}

/* ========== 隐藏默认标题 ========== */
figcaption {
  display: none; 
}

/* ========== 提示框 ========== */
.gallery-tip {
  text-align: center;
  padding: 1.5rem;
  margin-top: 3rem;
  font-family: "Cormorant Garamond", Georgia, serif;
  font-style: italic;
  color: var(--bs-secondary-color);
  border-radius: 12px;
  background: linear-gradient(135deg, 
    var(--bs-tertiary-bg) 0%, 
    transparent 100%
  );
}

/* ========== 页脚装饰 ========== */
.footer-ornament {
  text-align: center;
  margin: 3rem 0 1rem;
  font-size: 1.8rem;
  letter-spacing: 12px;
  color: var(--bs-secondary);
  opacity: 0.5;
}

/* ========== 响应式 ========== */
@media (max-width: 768px) {
  .gallery-wrapper {
    padding: 1rem;
    border-radius: 12px;
  }
  
  .intro-text {
    font-size: 1.05rem;
    padding: 0 1rem;
  }
  
  .section-title {
    font-size: 1.6rem;
  }
}
</style>

<!-- Google Fonts -->
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Cormorant+Garamond:ital,wght@0,400;0,500;0,600;1,400&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">

::: {.intro-text}
A curated collection of moments — from sweeping landscapes to intimate urban scenes.  
Each photograph tells its own quiet story.
:::

<div class="elegant-divider"><span class="divider-symbol">✦</span></div>

::: {.section-title}
Landscapes & Cityscapes
:::

::: {.gallery-wrapper}
::: {layout-ncol=2}

![](images/gallery/gallery-01.jpeg){group="main-gallery"}

![](images/gallery/gallery-04.jpeg){group="main-gallery"}

![](images/gallery/gallery-05.jpeg){group="main-gallery"}

![](images/gallery/gallery-06.jpeg){group="main-gallery"}

![](images/gallery/gallery-07.jpeg){group="main-gallery"}

![](images/gallery/gallery-02.jpeg){group="main-gallery"}

:::
:::

<div class="elegant-divider"><span class="divider-symbol">✦</span></div>

::: {.section-title}
Vertical Perspectives
:::

::: {.gallery-wrapper}
::: {layout-ncol=3}

![](images/gallery/gallery-03.jpeg){group="main-gallery"}

:::
:::

<div class="elegant-divider"><span class="divider-symbol">· · ·</span></div>

::: {.gallery-tip}
✨ Click on any image to view in full screen
:::

::: {.footer-ornament}
◆
:::
